description: Rate index reference table. Static data — one row per index. Stores all rate and inflation indices available in Murex (e.g. EURIBOR3M, USD SOFR CMP, MXNTIIE28D, SELIC). Not trade-specific — indices are defined centrally and referenced by trades. Joined from leg-level tables such as RT_LNGN_DBF via M_INDEX0 (leg 1) or M_INDEX1 (leg 2) = RT_INDEX_DBF.M_INDEX.

fields.remark: Primary key. Join target from RT_LNGN_DBF.M_INDEX0 (leg 1) or RT_LNGN_DBF.M_INDEX1 (leg 2).
Currency of the index (e.g. USD, EUR, BRL, MXN). Used to identify the currency context of the rate.

Short human-readable label of the index as displayed in Murex screens and trade tickets (e.g. 'USD SOFR CMP', 'EURIBOR3M', 'MXNTIIE28D', 'SELIC', 'USD SOFR H CMP LU 2'). This is the label visible in the generator configuration and flow schedule.
Full description of the index (e.g. 'USD Secured Overnight Financing Rate Compounded').
